description: Safe-by-default UniFi MCP: Network + Protect, multi-site, dry-run, audit log.
name: io.github.pete-builds/unifi

environmentVariables.description: When true, the server returns realistic mock data and requires no UniFi hardware. Defaults to true so the image is functional out of the box.
environmentVariables.name: STUB_MODE

environmentVariables.description: IP address or hostname of the UniFi OS gateway (UCG-Fiber, UDM Pro, etc). Required when STUB_MODE=false and MCP_UNIFI_CONTROLLERS_FILE is unset.
environmentVariables.name: UNIFI_HOST

environmentVariables.description: Local API key generated under Settings -> Control Plane -> Integrations on the gateway. Required when STUB_MODE=false and MCP_UNIFI_CONTROLLERS_FILE is unset.
environmentVariables.name: UNIFI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: UniFi controller site name. Defaults to 'default'.
environmentVariables.name: UNIFI_SITE

environmentVariables.description: Whether to verify the gateway's TLS certificate. Defaults to false because most home gateways use a self-signed cert.
environmentVariables.name: UNIFI_VERIFY_SSL

environmentVariables.description: Path to a YAML file describing multiple named controllers for multi-site management. When set, the legacy UNIFI_HOST / UNIFI_API_KEY env vars are ignored. Each entry needs name, host, api_key, and optionally port, site, verify_ssl.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_UNIFI_CONTROLLERS_FILE

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of modules to load. Known values: 'network', 'protect'. Defaults to 'network'. Set to 'network,protect' to enable UniFi Protect tools alongside Network tools.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_UNIFI_MODULES_ENABLED

environmentVariables.description: Audit log sink. One of 'file' (default), 'stdout', or 'syslog'. Every tool call is recorded to a JSONL stream with secrets scrubbed.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_UNIFI_AUDIT_SINK

environmentVariables.description: Path for the audit log file when MCP_UNIFI_AUDIT_SINK=file. Defaults to audit.jsonl in the process CWD.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_UNIFI_AUDIT_PATH

title: UniFi Gateway
